description: Minimal Claude-Code-like Python coding agent. Features track both product work (test framework, harness scaffold) and product-roadmap work (init/audit commands, memory, skills, multi-agent, observability).

state_machine.rule: Only ./init.sh (or a direct call to a feature's 'verification' command with passing output) may set status='done'. Agents may freely move between the other three states. 'done' is sticky — to re-open a done feature, change status back to 'in-progress' AND remove the 'evidence' field.

features.name: 测试基础设施搭建
features.description: 安装 pytest、创建目录结构、fixtures、配置

features.name: 核心单元测试: Prompt & Models
features.description: SystemPrompt 全部方法 + LLMClient 初始化和配置

features.name: 核心单元测试: Hooks
features.description: Hooks 事件系统 (context 压缩测试见 f-test-framework-p4)

features.name: 集成测试: 工具函数 & Agent Loop
features.description: bash/read/write/edit/glob/todo 工具 + agent_loop 端到端 + spawn_subagent

features.name: Context 压缩流程测试
features.description: update / current_tokens / _find_tail_cutoff / _generate_summary / _inject_todo_attachment / autocompact — includes LLM-failure fallback path
features.evidence: 26/26 context tests pass (was 25/26 with test_autocompact_llm_failure_skips_compaction failing). Full suite: 127 passed / 0 failed — init.sh exits 0 in 'all green' mode (no blocked-feature notice). Fix: when _generate_summary returns None, autocompact now skips compaction (leaves messages unchanged) instead of truncating to tail. Aligns with the test name 'skips_compaction' and the test assertion that messages[0]['content'] == 'Round 1' stays intact.

features.name: Phase 0: Harness 自洽 (Dogfooding)
features.description: 添加 AGENTS.md / init.sh / progress.md / session-handoff.md / docs/ / ruff / mypy / feature_list.json schema 迁移 + Phase 1-5 roadmap features。让本项目本身符合 harness-creator 最小五件套。
features.verification: test -f AGENTS.md && test -f init.sh && test -f progress.md && test -f session-handoff.md && ls docs/architecture.md docs/tools.md docs/hooks.md docs/context.md docs/testing.md && uv run python -c 'import json; json.load(open("feature_list.json"))'
features.evidence: 12 features in feature_list.json, schema ref: ./feature_list.schema.json. ./init.sh exits 0 (smart pass-gate tolerates f-test-framework-p4 blocked). All 5 docs present.

features.name: Phase 1: loop init 命令
features.description: Python 版 create-harness.mjs。在用户项目里生成 5 件套 + 项目类型自动检测 (Python/Node/Go/Rust/...) + --agent-file / --commands / --force 选项。
features.verification: uv run pytest tests/test_detect.py tests/test_init_cmd.py -v && uv run loop init /tmp/coldstart --agent-file CLAUDE.md --commands 'echo step1,echo step2' && test -f /tmp/coldstart/CLAUDE.md && test -x /tmp/coldstart/init.sh
features.evidence: 40 tests pass (16 detect + 24 init_cmd). Cold-start: 6 files written, --agent-file CLAUDE.md works, --commands overrides detected commands, feature_list.json has 5 not-started placeholders, init.sh is executable (chmod 0o755).

features.name: Phase 1: loop audit 命令
features.description: Python 版 validate-harness.mjs。5 维评分 (Instructions / State / Verification / Scope / Lifecycle) + JSON/HTML 输出 + 瓶颈指向。
features.verification: uv run pytest tests/test_audit_cmd.py -v && uv run loop audit . --json | uv run python -c 'import json,sys; r=json.load(sys.stdin); assert r["overall"] >= 70' && uv run loop audit . --html /tmp/loop-audit.html
features.evidence: 16 audit tests pass. loop audit . scores 92/100 (instructions 4/5, state 5/5, verification 5/5, scope 4/5, lifecycle 4/5). Bottleneck: instructions (Startup workflow text not detected). JSON output parses; HTML report 3177 bytes valid HTML. Total tests: 126 pass / 1 pre-existing failure.

features.name: Phase 2: 跨会话记忆 + 三层上下文
features.description: .minicode/memory/ 目录 + MEMORY.md 长期记忆 + 三段式 SystemPrompt 升级 (静态/会话/记忆) + memory_read/write/search 工具 + 三层上下文加载 (~500 / ~2000 / on-demand)。
features.evidence: 29 memory tests pass. Total: 160 pass / 0 fail. Cold-start: MemoryStore().append() then new MemoryStore().read() returns the persisted entries (verified with timestamps and search()). Self-audit: 92/100 (unchanged). Q3 detection implemented: is_own_project() correctly returns True for workdir's own .minicode/, False for sibling projects and orphan paths.

features.name: Phase 3: Skill Runtime + Tool Registry
features.description: .minicode/skills/ 目录约定 + SKILL.md frontmatter + load_skill 工具 + ToolRegistry 类 (name/schema/handler/permission_profile) + 权限管线 async 化。
features.evidence: uv run pytest tests/test_skills.py tests/test_tool_registry.py → 25/25 passed; skill files exist at loop/skills/{discovery,registry}.py + loop/agent/tool_registry.py; commit a986aee feat: f-skill-runtime — Phase 3 skill index + load_skill tool + ToolRegistry. Status flip authorized by user (resolves pre-existing data bug surfaced during f-eval-coverage).

features.name: Phase 4: Multi-Agent via Tool Calling + Checkpoint (Q4)
features.description: Fork 模式并行 subagent（ThreadPoolExecutor）+ SUB_SYSTEM 修复 + 结构化 return (summary + turn count + tool calls) + Checkpoint (Q4 hybrid：10 tool calls OR 5k tokens 写 .minicode/checkpoints/<session>.json, 原子 write)。简化的 Phase 4 —— 不含 MessageBus / Task Board / Swarm / 完整 lifecycle (用户的判断：tool calling + checkpoint 对当前产品足够)。
features.evidence: 206 tests pass / 0 fail (was 185, +21). init.sh 'all green'. Hooks thread-safe (Lock + copy-on-trigger). Fork 模式: 多个 task 工具调用同轮并发执行. SUB_SYSTEM 修复 (之前是空字符串). 结构化 return: [done: N turns, M tool calls]\n<summary>. Checkpoint: 写到 .minicode/checkpoint.json 原子 write (tmp + rename). loop run --resume 恢复. Cold-start: save/load roundtrip 验证 messages / tool_call_count / model / saved_at 全部保留.

features.name: 架构统一：产品全部内迁 loop/agent/
features.description: 原根目录的 main.py / context.py / hook.py / models.py / prompt.py 全部内迁到 loop/agent/。三层加载从 loop/memory/context.py 并入 loop/agent/prompt.py（消除概念分裂）。loop CLI 加 run subcommand 替代 python main.py。
features.verification: uv run pytest tests/ -v && uv run loop audit . | grep 'Overall'
features.evidence: 160/0 tests pass. init.sh 'all green'. loop audit 92/100. loop --help shows init/audit/run. Renames tracked by git (R status).

features.name: Phase 5: Observability + Eval 套件
features.description: 结构化 .minicode/trace.jsonl + 30+ eval cases (10 来自 harness-creator 基线 + 20 产品专属) + HTML 报告 + review→rule 闭环 + ablation 实验。
features.verification: uv run python -m loop eval --html /tmp/eval.html && test -f /tmp/eval.html
features.evidence: uv run python -m loop.cli eval --html /tmp/eval.html → 'Eval results: 32/32 passed', HTML report written (4218 bytes); ./init.sh → 225 pytest passed, 0 ruff, 0 mypy

features.name: Phase 5 closure: CI 跑 init.sh + eval + audit
features.description: .github/workflows/ci.yml: push/PR 时跑 ./init.sh + loop eval --fail-under 100 + loop audit .。Phase 5 §4 acceptance 明文要求 'Eval pass rate + 5-dimension score + structural smoke all show up in CI'。
features.verification: test -f .github/workflows/ci.yml && uv run python -m loop.cli eval --fail-under 100 && uv run python -m loop.cli audit . > /tmp/audit.txt
features.evidence: ./init.sh → 225 pytest passed, 0 ruff, 0 mypy; uv run python -m loop.cli eval → 'Eval results: 37/37 passed' (5 new CI cases); uv run python -m loop.cli audit . → 'Overall: 92/100, Bottleneck: instructions'; .github/workflows/ci.yml: 893 chars, ./init.sh + loop eval --fail-under 100 + loop audit, triggers on push + pull_request to main, uploads audit report as artifact.

features.name: Phase 5 §2 closure: permission / compaction / subagent / cross-session eval cases
features.description: Roadmap Phase 5 §2 明列 4 类 case,当前 37 个 case 一个都没覆盖。补齐后 ~45 case。
features.evidence: uv run python -m loop.cli eval → 'Eval results: 48/48 passed' (was 37/37, +11 Phase 5 §2 cases); ./init.sh → 225 pytest passed, 0 ruff, 0 mypy. Coverage: permission denial (sudo/dd via hook + path escape via safe_path); compaction (microcompact clear + skip-below-KEEP_RECENT + should_compact 85% threshold); subagent (turn cap enforced at 30 + SUB_TOOLS excludes task → recursion prevented at schema); memory (search case-insensitive + summary truncates to max_lines).

features.name: Permission 子系统: 3 套并行 deny-list 合并为单一来源 PermissionPolicy
features.description: 合并 run_bash 硬编码 dangerous / Hooks.DENY_LIST / PERMISSION_RULES 到 loop/agent/permissions.py 的单一 PermissionPolicy dataclass。run_bash 和 Hooks.check_permission_hook 都从 DEFAULT_POLICY 读。保留 DENY_LIST + PERMISSION_RULES 旧名字 re-export 以兼容。新增 4 个 eval case 锁定 single-source-of-truth + run_bash/hook 一致性 + policy 是数据驱动。
features.evidence: uv run python -m loop.cli eval → 'Eval results: 52/52 passed' (was 48, +4 permission_unify cases); ./init.sh → 225 pytest passed, 0 ruff, 0 mypy. Refactor: 3 parallel deny lists (run_bash hardcoded 5 / Hooks.DENY_LIST 7 / PERMISSION_RULES 2) consolidated into loop/agent/permissions.py::DEFAULT_POLICY (1 tuple deny_patterns + 1 tuple rules). run_bash and Hooks(policy=...) both read from DEFAULT_POLICY. run_bash now blocks dd if=/dev/... (was a real bug — eval case permission-deny-list-blocks-dd surfaced it). tests/test_tools.py::test_run_bash_dangerous_blocked updated to substring match + added dd coverage. Idempotent across reruns.

features.name: Phase 5 success metric: cross-session resume eval cases
features.description: Roadmap §6 'Cross-session resume success rate ≥ 90%' 当前 0 case 覆盖。补 ~8 个 case 锁定 checkpoint 的核心 contract: round-trip 完整性 + 损坏文件容错 + iso timestamp + tool-use blocks 完整保序 + 端到端 `loop run --resume` 子进程恢复 history。
features.evidence: uv run python -m loop.cli eval → 'Eval results: 60/60 passed' (was 52, +8 checkpoint cases); ./init.sh → 225 pytest passed, 0 ruff, 0 mypy. Coverage: round-trip preserves tool_use/tool_result blocks (the LLM context); load returns None on corrupt JSON; load returns None on missing file (fresh-start contract); saved_at is parseable ISO 8601; messages preserve order across 20 messages; maybe_save fires at tool threshold (N=10) and token threshold (K=5000); end-to-end `loop run --resume` subprocess restores history (3 messages, 7 tool calls logged).

features.name: harness.toml per-project 配置 (Phase 1 §3 + Phase 3 §3 + Q4 兑现)
features.description: 实现 roadmap 承诺的 per-project harness.toml: 加载器读 TOML → 转成 HarnessConfig(policy, checkpoint, disabled_tools)。3 个 section: [permissions] (deny_patterns / deny_patterns_add / rules.add)、[checkpoint] (every_tool_calls / every_tokens)、[tools.<name>] (enabled=false)。可选文件,缺失用 DEFAULT_POLICY。malformed TOML 抛 ConfigError 带行号。
features.evidence: uv run python -m loop.cli eval → 'Eval results: 68/68 passed' (was 60, +8 harness-toml cases); ./init.sh → 225 pytest passed, 0 ruff, 0 mypy. Closes 3 roadmap promises in one feature: Phase 1 §3 (per-project permission config), Phase 3 §3 ([tools] disable section), Phase 4 §5 / Q4 ([checkpoint] threshold override). Sections: [permissions] deny_patterns (replace) / deny_patterns_add (append) / rules.add (custom); [checkpoint] every_tool_calls / every_tokens; [tools.<name>] enabled = false. harness.toml at workdir root; missing file → HarnessConfig.from_defaults(); malformed TOML → ConfigError. loop init now scaffolds a commented harness.toml skeleton (741 chars). Idempotent across reruns.

features.name: Phase 5 §6 metric: 10× kill-and-restart resume benchmark
features.description: Roadmap §6 'Cross-session resume success rate ≥ 90% (10× kill-and-restart)' 一直没有 metric runner。Synthetic fixture-based benchmark: scripted LLM (5 tool_use + 1 end_turn),每个 trial 在 3 个 tool call 后 snapshot + checkpoint.save,新进程加载 + 续跑 2 个 tool call + end_turn。断言:resumed LLM 第一个 call 收到 pre-kill 历史 + 最终 5 个 tool_result 全在。Synthetic proxy(canary),不是 production telemetry,但抓回归够用。
features.evidence: uv run python -m loop.cli eval → 'Eval results: 69/69 passed' (was 68, +1 benchmark case); ./init.sh → 225 pytest passed, 0 ruff, 0 mypy. Benchmark: 10/10 trials, 100% resume success, ~1.2s total. Canary property VERIFIED: injecting `messages.clear()` regression in agent_loop → benchmark flips to 0/10 (FAIL), restoring → 10/10 (PASS). Refactored agent_loop to accept llm_client parameter (backward-compat default to module-level). Caveat (documented in module docstring): synthetic fixture proxy, not production telemetry.
